summary: Comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ WhatsApp/Phone number centralization (Iteration 132). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The config/contact.js correctly exports VENULOQ_SUPPORT with phone, phoneFormatted, telLink, and whatsappLink(). All 9 files previously with hardcoded numbers now import from this single source. The env var REACT_APP_SUPPORT_PHONE=919876543210 is being used correctly across all pages.

auth_page_google_button_visible.detail: Google button 'Continue with Google' is visible on auth page

auth_page_apple_button_hidden_on_web.detail: Apple button is NOT rendered on web (correct - only shows in Capacitor native iOS via isCapacitor() check)

auth_page_email_button_visible.detail: Email button 'Continue with Email' is visible below 'or' divider

auth_page_password_link_visible.detail: 'Sign in with password instead' link is visible

auth_me_valid_token.detail: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token

my_enquiries_returns_leads.detail: GET /api/my-enquiries returns leads list with last_activity enrichment

customer_dashboard_loads.detail: Dashboard shows welcome header, enquiry cards with last activity timestamps, and 5-tab BottomTabBar

bottom_tab_bar_5_tabs.detail: BottomTabBar shows 5 tabs on mobile: Home, Explore, Saved, Requests, Profile

landing_page_loads.detail: Landing page at / loads without errors

landing_page_concierge_link_centralized.detail: 'Talk to a Concierge' link uses tel:+919876543210 from VENULOQ_SUPPORT.telLink (not hardcoded)

support_page_loads.detail: Support page loads and shows contact options with centralized phone numbers

support_page_phone_centralized.detail: Phone action uses tel:+919876543210 from VENULOQ_SUPPORT

support_page_whatsapp_centralized.detail: WhatsApp action uses https://wa.me/919876543210 from VENULOQ_SUPPORT

contact_page_loads.detail: Contact page loads and shows contact info with centralized phone numbers

contact_page_whatsapp_centralized.detail: WhatsApp link uses https://wa.me/919876543210 from VENULOQ_SUPPORT

venue_search_delhi.detail: Venue search page loads with 29 venues for Delhi

logout_works.detail: Logout works and redirects to /login (Team Portal)

public_landing_page_loads.detail: Public landing page at /public loads correctly

whatsapp_centralization_verification.verification_status: All 9 files correctly import from @/config/contact and use VENULOQ_SUPPORT

critical_code_review_comments: config/contact.js correctly reads REACT_APP_SUPPORT_PHONE from env with fallback to 919876543210
All 9 files correctly import VENULOQ_SUPPORT from @/config/contact
AuthPage.js correctly implements isCapacitor() check to hide Apple button on web (line 281-288)
Zero hardcoded phone numbers remain in source code (verified via code review)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp/Phone number centralization fully tested. The config/contact.js exports VENULOQ_SUPPORT with phone, phoneFormatted, telLink, and whatsappLink() method. All 9 files previously with hardcoded numbers now import from this single source. The env var REACT_APP_SUPPORT_PHONE=919876543210 is the placeholder until final number is confirmed. Auth page correctly shows Google > (no Apple on web) > Email > Password link order. Password login works with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 -> lands on /my-enquiries. Customer dashboard shows enquiry cards with last activity timestamps and 5-tab BottomTabBar.
